title: 4 Pcs Plastic Trays for Food Serving, 24×17CM Rectangular Serving Tray, Reusable Dinner Trays, Small Tray for Drinks,Snacks,Fruits,Desserts(Pink,Green,Purple,Yellow)
features: 【4 Sizes】We offer you 4 different colours, size 24×17×1.5cm plastic trays, including pink, green, purple, yellow, soft colours to meet your daily needs.

【High Quality Material】Our food serving trays are made of high quality PP material, which is safe, non-toxic, odourless, drop-proof, durable and not easy to be deformed, and maintains stability for long time use.
【Comfortable Design】Plastic tray with classic rectangular design, smooth and rounded edges, no burrs, ergonomic. Thick bottom with non-slip texture for better stability and avoid tipping.
【Easy to Clean and Store】Plastic dinner plate smooth surface design, stains wipe clean, support hand wash and machine wash, keep clean and tidy, stacking design, space-saving, convenient storage.

【Widely Used】Plastic rectangular tray is suitable for kitchen, dining table, living room, office desk, etc. It can be used as storage tray, meal tray, snack tray or decorative tray, flexible and practical.
description: Set Contents 1 x Pink plastic tray 1 x Green plastic tray 1 x Purple plastic tray 1 x Yellow plastic tray Specification Size: 24×17×1.5cm/9.44×6.69×0.59in Material: Plastic Quantity: 4 Colour: pink, green, purple, yellow Features 1. Four colours combination, simple and fashionable, Scandinavian style colour scheme, enhance the beauty of home. 2. High quality plastic material, durable, not easy to crack or deformation. 3. Non-slip bottom design, effectively prevent sliding, more stable use. 4. Multi-purpose design, can be used in kitchen, dining table, office, bathroom and other multi-scenarios. 5. Easy to clean, support hand wash and machine wash, keep clean and tidy. Precautions for Use 1. Avoid contact with high temperature to prevent deformation. 2. Do not use sharp tools to scrape the surface. 3. Wash it in time after use, keep it dry. 4. Store it in a dry and ventilated place to avoid prolonged exposure to the sun. 5. Do not carry heavy objects for a long time to avoid deformation of the tray.
